PROP-baseauction-inv-024.text: Dutch auction price curve must be monotonically non-increasing over time; no price increase after decay starts.
PROP-baseauction-inv-024.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: getAssetOutAmount(t2) <= getAssetOutAmount(t1) for same input

locations.note: Decay function must be monotonically non-increasing; rounding direction (mulWadUp) is critical for monotonicity
